summary_en: 600,000 shares (6.2% of S/O), ¥426M upper limit, ToSTNeT-3, settlement May 22, 2026 at ¥710/share closing price. Stated reason: capital efficiency and EPS accretion following receipt of major shareholder sale intention.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and purchase of treasury shares via off-exchange trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
On 21 May 2026, IZAWA TOWEL's board resolved to acquire up to 600,000 treasury shares (6.2% of outstanding) for a maximum of ¥426 million. The method is off-exchange trading (ToSTNeT-3) executed on 22 May 2026 at the previous day's closing price of ¥710 per share during the 08:45 trading window. Results will be published immediately after the trading window closes.

The company stated that the acquisition is undertaken to improve capital efficiency and earnings per share amid receipt of a major shareholder's intention to sell holdings, while avoiding supply-demand imbalances in the market. The purchase order is valid for the trading window only, and partial or non-execution is possible depending on market conditions.
